content.query:
USE electric_vehicle_ldw
GO

IF OBJECT_ID('silver.location') IS NOT NULL
    DROP EXTERNAL TABLE silver.location
GO

CREATE EXTERNAL TABLE  silver.location
WITH
(
    DATA_SOURCE = electric_vehicle_source,
    LOCATION = 'silver/location',
    FILE_FORMAT = parquet_file_format
)AS
SELECT * FROM bronze.location
GO

SELECT *  FROM silver.location
GO
